description_long: This is a cylindrical, metal trash bin painted in a vibrant red color, featuring vertical ridges along its body for structural reinforcement and visual interest. The bin is topped with a domed, removable lid that has a prominent, rectangular metal handle at the center, allowing for easy lifting. Two external, side-mounted metal handles are attached near the top rim for convenient carrying. The surface shows signs of wear, including scratches, chipped paint, and some rust, particularly along one vertical ridge and on the lid, suggesting prolonged outdoor use. The lid fits snugly over the rim, and there are no visible openings or pedal mechanisms. There is no visible labeling, signage, or recycling symbols on the exterior, making it a generic waste container suitable for urban environments.
description: A red, cylindrical metal trash bin with a domed removable lid, central top handle, and two side-mounted carrying handles. The surface is weathered with visible scratches and rust, and the bin is unmarked.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid with a central handle and a prominent rusted vertical ridge on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the external side-mounted handles and some black stains on the lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth cylindrical body, domed lid with central handle, and visible black stains but no handles in view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the other side-mounted handle visible and less rust compared to the front.
attribute_handle_design: external side-mounted handles and a top-mounted handle
